scripts.quickstart: npm run prepare:irpkg -- examples/quickstart.virpkg.json && node scripts/quickstart-url.mjs
scripts.prepare:pages: npm run prepare:irpkg -- examples/quickstart.virpkg.json && npm run prepare:irpkg -- examples/fib.virpkg.json && npm run prepare:irpkg -- examples/mergesort.virpkg.json
scripts.build:local-artifact: npm run build:demo && npm run prepare:pages && npm run package:local-artifact
scripts.build:sdk-artifact: npm run build:demo && npm run package:sdk-artifact
scripts.build:site: npm run build:demo && npm run prepare:pages && npm run package:sdk-artifact && npm run package:local-artifact && vite build --base /lean-vir/
scripts.test: npm run check:boundary-registry && npm run test:upstream && npm run test:runtime && npm run test:fixtures
